div.head: The Minister in Haiti (Gordon) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 14. My despatches 453 of March 24, and 465 of April 7.Neither printed. The Foreign Minister informed me today that exchange of notesSigned April 28, 1937; for text, see France, Journal Ofllciel, May 15, 1937, p. 5293. effecting modus vivendi pending consummation of Franco-Haitian commercial treaty negotiations had just been signed. The modus vivendi gives Haiti a quota of approximately 37,000 sacks of coffee to be shipped from here between now and September 1; the French get straight minimum tariff treatment and there is no mention of an avenant or of specific tariff reductions for additional non-specialty articles.
